name: NERF Ultra One Motorised Blaster
description: The NERF Ultra One is the most advanced NERF blaster ever made. Its motorised flywheel fires NERF Ultra darts — the farthest-flying NERF darts ever — up to 36 m (120 ft). The 25-dart drum, built-in acceleration button, and slam-fire action let you unleash rapid-fire volleys. Compatible only with NERF Ultra darts for maximum distance and accuracy.

additionalInfo.value: Hasbro, Inc., 1027 Newport Ave, Pawtucket, RI 02861
Do not aim at eyes or face. Use only official NERF Ultra darts.
NERF Ultra One blaster, 25-dart drum, 25 NERF Ultra darts

reviews.title: Absolutely destroys the competition
reviews.reviewText: The range on this thing is unreal. We set up an outdoor battle in the garden and the Ultra One outranged every other blaster my kids owned. The 25-dart drum means you're firing for a long time before reload. Kids love it.

reviews.title: Best NERF blaster on the market
reviews.reviewText: My 10-year-old has three NERF blasters and this is the undisputed champion of the collection. Slam-fire empties all 25 darts in seconds. The motorised acceleration means consistent range every shot.

reviews.title: Brilliant but eats batteries
reviews.reviewText: The performance is outstanding — best range of any stock blaster. My one criticism is it goes through AA batteries fairly quickly on heavy use days. Keep a pack of rechargeables handy and you're golden.

reviews.title: Epic birthday gift
reviews.reviewText: My son turned 9 and his face when he opened this was priceless. He and his friends spent four hours battling in the garden. The range advantage is significant — he was picking off targets from across the lawn.

reviews.title: Ultra darts are proprietary — buy extras!
reviews.reviewText: Quick tip: the Ultra darts are only compatible with Ultra-series blasters, so stock up when you order. The blaster itself is exceptional — motorised, fast, accurate. Just budget for extra darts.
